name: GhostItem Bag
author: t-Ghost-t
description: GhostBag reorganizes the inventory into sane, easy to find categories.
You may encounter a stutter on first bag open, then zero latency for remainder of play session.
- 0. A hidden pocket that hides TM/HM and Mail.
- 1. Medicine: HP/PP recovery, Revives, and medicinal consumables.
- 2. Status & Battle: Stat-boosters (X-Items), status cures, and combat triggers.
- 3. Capture & Mutate: Pokéballs, Evolution Stones, and DNA Splicers for fusions.
- 4. Held Items: Equippable gear, Mega Stones, and type-boosting items.
- 5. Enhancers: EXP Candies, Stat vitamins (Protein/Iron), and Ability/Nature modifiers.
- 6. Field Utility: Overworld tools like Repels, Lures, and Escape Ropes.
- 7. Treasures: Sellable valuables like Nuggets, Fossils, and rare antiques.
